# Lab 0.1 - CNN Experiments on CIFAR-10

Simple CNN experiments on CIFAR-10 dataset using PyTorch, comparing different optimizers and activation functions.

## Experiments

Experiment        Optimizer         Activation
Experiment 0      SGD (lr=0.0001)   LeakyReLU
Experiment 1      Adam              LeakyReLU
Experiment 2      Adam              Tanh

## Files
- `01_cifar_10_cnn_experiments.ipynb` — all 3 experiments in one notebook

## Requirements
- PyTorch
- TorchVision
- TensorBoard
